records.provider: Multiple Pharmacies (incl. Caremark, OptumRx, Allwin, ScriptCycle, Cigna Healthspring, Argus, SFS, Medco Health, My Rx Card, Omnisys Immunizations, Blink Health, McKesson Health PBM, GoodRx, Paramount Lonestar, Express Scripts)

flagged.reason: No summary or aggregation of total charges or payment fields is provided for the pharmacy fills over the date range. Only line-item fills present; patient-level or period-total amounts are not shown. Cannot extract financial fields at summary or range level.

The summary does not provide an explicit patient balance after insurance and patient/third-party payments; original billing ledgers would be needed for per-claim responsibility, here only total patient, insurer, and third-party paid amounts are tallied. Description field is generalized due to the document type.
